purpose: Standard envelope shape for lifecycle-managed tests, gates, evals, benchmarks, conformance checks, and release checks.

field_contract.ok: boolean lifecycle health for the managed check in the current lifecycle artifact
field_contract.test_id: stable gate, suite, or test identifier
field_contract.classification: one of the Validation lifecycle classifications
field_contract.invariant: human-readable invariant protected by the check
field_contract.runtime_owner: runtime subsystem that should become stronger if this check remains necessary or fails repeatedly
field_contract.failure_signature: stable failure signature when the lifecycle artifact sees a failure or null when healthy
field_contract.strengthen_signal: what persistent failure says about the system that needs strengthening
